title: Verse vs Prose — sample
instructions: For each page, decide what the rendered text reads as. You are the ground-truth authority; if it is genuinely ambiguous, say so in the note. Hints from the model panel are hidden by default — only reveal them after you have formed your own judgement.

items.structure:
block 13 (window w51)
run: 1 paragraph, 4 contextual-spacing breaks
wrap: lines do not reach the right margin
lead: no first-line indent
items.question: Is this block lineated verse, or prose that happens to wrap?
items.hint: Model panel: 3/4 readers voted "verse" (one abstained, citing the missing stanza gap).

items.structure:
block 68 (window w288)
mixed run — heading line followed by body
items.question: Tag each line as it should read in the final book.
items.hint: Panel disagreed on whether L1 is a heading (prose) or the verse's first line.
